admin:mailboxes:restore-aggregated.description: Restore aggregated mailboxes: Aggregates users and emails from multiple backup folders (de-duplicated) and restores them to Mail-in-a-Box server

admin:mailboxes:sync-master.description: Sync master backup folder: Syncs master backup folder with mailserver (skips duplicates, use MASTER_BACKUP_DIR to specify master backup location)

admin:mailboxes:archive-master.description: Archive master backup folder: Packages master backup folder into a date&timestamped archive folder (use MASTER_BACKUP_DIR to specify master backup location)

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=${APP_PATH} STACK_NAME=${STACK_NAME} DOMAIN=${DOMAIN} DRY_RUN=${DRY_RUN:-0} node dist/libs/admin/admin-s3-empty/empty-buckets.mjs

FEATURE_CDK_EMCNOTARY_STACKS_ENABLED=1 if [ -n "$DOMAIN" ] && [ "$DOMAIN" != "emcnotary.com" ]; then echo "Note: Emptying buckets for domain $DOMAIN"; DOMAIN=$DOMAIN APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/core pnpm nx run admin-s3-empty:empty || true; else pnpm nx run admin-s3-empty:empty:emcnotary || true; fi && node ../../../../dist/libs/infra/config-loader/bin/cdk-deploy.js destroy --force ${DOMAIN:+--context domain=$DOMAIN}

if [ "$FEATURE_INSTANCE_BOOTSTRAP_ENABLED" = "0" ]; then echo "ERROR: FEATURE_INSTANCE_BOOTSTRAP_ENABLED=0 - Bootstrap is disabled"; exit 1; fi && ts-node tools/instance-bootstrap.cli.ts --domain=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} --region=${CDK_DEFAULT_REGION:-us-east-1} ${STACK:+--stack=$STACK} ${PROFILE:+--profile=$PROFILE} ${DRY_RUN:+--dry-run} ${RESTORE_PREFIX:+--restore-prefix=$RESTORE_PREFIX} ${REBOOT_AFTER_SETUP:+--reboot}
